query:
WITH moved AS (
             UPDATE files
                SET import_id = $2,
                    path = substring(path from $4)
              WHERE import_id = $1
                AND EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM unnest($3::text[]) AS f(folder)
                   WHERE path = f.folder OR left(path, length(f.folder) + 1) = f.folder || '/'
                )
              RETURNING 1
           )
           SELECT count(*) as "count!" FROM moved
